# Yamada Ichiro Portfolio

> Personal portfolio for Yamada Ichiro, full-stack developer based in Japan.

## Canonical URL
- https://www.galkins.dev/

## Summary
- Yamada Ichiro builds clean, fast, and user-focused websites.
- Focus areas: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js/Express, UI/UX, responsive frontend.
- Availability: freelance and full-time opportunities (JST timezone).

## Contact
- Email: YamadaIchiro0207@outlook.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Cr0wn0207

- Mobirise Japan: https://mobirise.jp/

- Product Senses: https://product-senses.mazrica.com/
- Visioncon Global: https://visioncon-global.com/
